prerequisites: An Outbrain Amplify account with API access. The Amplify API is granted to select partners, so request access through the Outbrain partner-api program and accept the Amplify API Terms and Conditions.
An Outbrain username (email) and password for the account whose Amplify data you want to sync.
A start_date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2017-01-25) marking the earliest data to sync. This config field is required.
Optionally decide values for end_date, report_granularity (daily, weekly, or monthly), geo_location_breakdown (country, region, or subregion), and conversion_count before configuring the source.

authMethods.name: Username and password (credentials.password)
authMethods.summary: Provide your Outbrain username and password under the credentials object. The connector authenticates to https://api.outbrain.com/amplify/v0.1/login using HTTP Basic Auth and receives an OB-TOKEN-V1 token to send on subsequent requests.

authMethods.name: Access token (credentials.access_token)
authMethods.summary: Provide a pre-generated Outbrain OB-TOKEN-V1 token under the credentials object instead of a password. Generate it from the Amplify API Token Page or via the /login endpoint. Tokens are valid for 30 days, and expired tokens will not grant API access.

setupSteps.title: Get Outbrain Amplify API access
setupSteps.body: Confirm you have an Outbrain Amplify account, then register for API access through the Outbrain partner-api program (the Amplify API is open to select partners). Provide your name, email, Outbrain username, and company details, and accept the Amplify API Terms and Conditions.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an access token (optional)
setupSteps.body: If you want to authenticate with a token rather than a password, generate one. Through the web UI, open your Amplify API Token Page and generate a token. Through the API, call the /login endpoint at https://api.outbrain.com/amplify/v0.1/login with HTTP Basic Auth (your username and password); the response returns an OB-TOKEN-V1 token. Tokens are valid for 30 days and at most two new tokens can be created per hour.

setupSteps.title: Enter credentials in the connector
setupSteps.body: Under the required credentials config field, provide either credentials.access_token (a generated OB-TOKEN-V1 token) or your username together with credentials.password. The connector uses these to authenticate against the Outbrain Amplify API.

setupSteps.title: Configure the sync settings
setupSteps.body: Set start_date (required, YYYY-MM-DD) to the earliest date to sync. Optionally set end_date (YYYY-MM-DD), report_granularity (daily, weekly, or monthly), geo_location_breakdown (country, region, or subregion), and conversion_count to control reporting scope and detail.
